segments.scene_description: A stationary view of an ornate circular room with gothic architecture. Several figures in dark robes sit around a large curved table, while natural light filters through tall stained-glass windows. The room features blue walls with decorative gold trim, wooden cabinets, and an elaborate chandelier hanging from the domed ceiling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze upon an ornate gothic chamber, capturing the stillness of a formal assembly. It begins with a wide view of the circular room, where natural light filters through tall stained-glass windows to illuminate the blue walls and decorative gold trim. The camera lingers on the figures in dark robes seated around a large curved wooden table, emphasizing the solemnity of the gathering. The scene then encompasses the surrounding architectural details, from the wooden cabinets lining the walls to the elaborate chandelier hanging from the domed ceiling.
